payload.answer: Inspection request acknowledged for mem_123. No memory content is provided in the input, so there is nothing to summarize or reconcile.

entity_resolution.reason: The request refers directly to a specific memory identifier; no disambiguation is needed for inspection.

memory_cards.statement: The user requested inspection of memory item mem_123 via /brain inspect memory mem_123.

details: Parsed request as a read-only memory inspection.
No durable memory was created or modified.

repair_options: If you want the memory contents analyzed, provide the retrieved record for mem_123.
If you want a different memory item inspected, supply the correct memory ID.
